allergy_notices: Contains Methylparaben and Propylparaben which may cause localized allergic reactions. Contains Sodium Metabisulfite (피로아硫酸나트륨) which can rarely cause severe hypersensitivity reactions or bronchospasm.
safety_logic_triggers.usage_advice: Contains 2% Hydroquinone. Must be used strictly as a spot treatment for hyperpigmentation. Do not expose treated areas to sunlight; daytime application requires broad-spectrum SPF, or it should be restricted to night use only.
